title: Deliciously Nutty Thai Yoghurt Satay
description: A nutty and crisp Thai dish featuring natural yoghurt, this satay is a nostalgic treat that is dairy-free friendly. It combines the richness of yoghurt with the crunch of nuts and the flavor of Thai spices.
instructions: In a blender, combine yoghurt, peanut butter, lime juice, and honey, and blend until smooth.
Heat the coconut milk in a saucepan over medium heat until it starts to simmer.
Add the Thai red curry paste to the coconut milk and stir until well combined.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and let simmer for 2 minutes.
Stir the yoghurt mixture into the coconut milk mixture and let simmer for another minute.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the chopped peanuts and salt.
Let the satay cool to room temperature, then cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Just before serving, garnish with chopped fresh cilantro.
Serve the satay chilled, garnished with additional chopped peanuts if desired.
